options.name: -fixPlacedInsts
options.description: do not move existing placed instances to find location for newly placed insts

options.name: -place_detail_use_GA_filler_groups
options.description: {true|false} filler cell insts will only be replaced by logic insts that belong to same GA groups.

options.name: -reportSpareCells
options.description: report spare instances which are selected to map unplaced logical instances

options.name: -saveODInfoOnly
options.description: save the snapshot of the site OD information to DB

options.name: -useGACells
options.description: place new cells on GA grid, at locations where given techSite is available

options.name: -useGAFillerCells
options.description: replace given filler cell insts with new logic insts, assuming GA pattern will match, if orient is same

options.name: -useSpareCells
options.description: convert the spare closest to optimal location of new inst
